summary: Made two surgical seam edits: rephrased the early October beat to avoid echoing the adjacent chapter's opening scaffold, and sharpened the final sentence so Lola's return to performance mode hands off more cleanly into the next chapter's lookout posture.
edits: Rephrased the opening scene's October line to avoid repeating the neighboring "October had arrived while..." construction.
Adjusted the closing sentence to keep Lola's word-loss beat while foregrounding that her performance mask is back in place for the next chapter.
